case_title: NELS LUNDQUIST VS. JOHN F. STEFFEN JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-19-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-01-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65533987)

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUNDQUIST, NELS AS TO DEFENDANT STEFFEN JR, JOHN F. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-12-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
